case.title: NEW YORK CENT R. CO. v. WHEELING CAN CO

opinion.h1: NEW YORK CENT R. CO. v. WHEELING CAN CO, 270 U.S. 645 (1926)
opinion.h2: NEW YORK CENTRAL RAILROAD COMPANY, petitioner, v. WHEELING CAN COMPANY. [Footnote 1] No. 887.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John C. Palmer, Jr., of New York City, for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of Appeals of the State of West Virginia denied.

f.p: Order vacated 46 S. Ct. -, 70 L. Ed. -.[ New York Cent R Co v. Wheeling Can Co 270 U.S. 645 (1926) ]
